title: Smashing!
description:
You need a few things, Iron Plates, Copper Plates, Dirty Glass Shards, and a Sand Mold, the best way to do that is to press them. Attach your press to the water wheels and watch it go to town.

FYI: Iron Plates and Copper plates are half of the 4 main ingredients for the Basic Circuit! So you will need to automate this!.
